entry.title: Technical assesment to update resources in Rise
entry.content:
Hi all,

for one of Rise customer, we've to extend resources. to da that sales team ask us to make technical assessment. How can we do it? Is there any documentation about it? or is it same as first sales technical assessment?

 

Thanks in advance

BR

Haldun SECKIN

entry.title: Re: Why do we need read entity in RAP ?
entry.content:
it deals with transaction buffer, I believe.

imagine you are creating a record, it is not saved yet, will you get that record via querying cds?probably not, but Read entity will give that record, if I am not wrong.

same for update case, if update is not saved, querying cds will give u old data, read entity will give updated data in your session/transaction.

entry.title: Query facturación con folio uuid por fecha
entry.content: Saludos, uso SAP business one , y quisiera un query que contenga el número y nombre de cliente, fecha de factura, monto total de la factura el folio fiscal (uuid) de la misma

entry.title: Query pagos recibidos con facturas relacionadas y su monto
entry.content: Saludos, busco un query donde se reflejen los pagos recibidos donde se vea reflejados la o las facturas que comprenda el pago, el monto del mismo, y que salga la forma de pago (efectivo, transferencia, tdc, cheque) y la fecha tanto de contabilización como de Transferencia

entry.title: Re: Extending SAPUI5 apps: Adaptation projects vs. Extension projects
entry.content:
@Georgi 

Its sometimes about internal skills you have in the team

SAP is pushing more and more front-end work to ABAP CDS in ADT

Cheers

entry.title: Designing Script-Based Pop-Up Variable Screens with Mandatory Field Selection in SAC
entry.content:
Brief Snapshot

The Best Run Bike model was used as the model in the study.

Introduction

Hello! Have you ever faced a situation where precise variable selection is mandatory to ensure accurate data display in your reports? If you answer yes, in this blog I’ll walk you through an interactive popup-based variable selection screen in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC). The example covers a scenario where users must select Country and Customer Status before continuing, ensuring better data relevance and user experience.

Let’s explore this hands-on implementation step by step, breaking down the scripting logic behind creating this functionality.

Why Use a Variable Screen?

Variable screens in SAC are essential for guiding users to make the right data selections before interacting with dashboards. By using a popup for variable selection:

  • Data accuracy is improved by forcing mandatory selections.
  • System performance is optimized by reducing unnecessary queries.
  • User experience is enhanced by providing a clear, guided process.

This method is especially useful in scenarios where filtering data by key dimensions (like Country or Customer Status) is critical for business decisions.

Key Functionalities

Here’s what we’ll achieve:

  1. A popup screen to select Country, Customer Status, and optionally Sales Agent.
  2. Validation to ensure mandatory fields are filled before applying the filters.
  3. Data refresh controls to prevent backend queries while the popup is open.
  4. Efficient application of user selections via scripting.

Step-by-Step Implementation

1. Filling the Dropdowns

Page_Screen oninitialization codes:

 

 

//open Popup_Screen
Popup_Screen.open();

//call function which fills dropdowns
VariableObjects.fillVariableDropdowns();

//call function which pause widgets refresh on the initial state
VariableObjects.pauseOn();

 

 

The values in the dropdown lists are taken from the current data set and added to the corresponding list. For this, the fillVariableDropdowns() function is defined.

This function takes the Country, Customer Status, and Sales Agent fields from the data source and adds them to the dropdowns accordingly. This way, when users open the popup, they can see all the options for that field.
Dropdown Information:

  

fillVariableDropdowns() function:

 

 

//Create variables selected for Country, selected2 for Sales Agent and selected3 for Customer Status variables
var selected = Table_13.getDataSource().getMembers("Country");
var selected2= Table_13.getDataSource().getMembers("Sales_Agent");
var selected3= Table_13.getDataSource().getMembers("Customer_Status");

//Related members are added to the dropdown of each variable
if(selected.length>0) {
	for( var i=0; i<selected.length; i++) {
		Dropdown_Country.addItem(selected[i].id, selected[i].description);
	}
}

if(selected2.length>0) {
	for( var k=0; k<selected2.length; k++) {
		Dropdown_SalesAgent.addItem(selected2[k].id,selected2[k].description);
	}
}

if(selected3.length>0) {
	for( var j=0; j<selected3.length; j++) {
		Dropdown_CustStatus.addItem(selected3[j].id,selected3[j].description);
	}
}

 

 

2. Controlling Data Refresh

To improve performance and avoid unnecessary backend queries, data refresh is paused while the popup is active.

pauseOn: Pauses the refresh for all widgets (tables, charts, etc.).

 

 

Table_12.getDataSource().setRefreshPaused(PauseMode.On);
Chart_10.getDataSource().setRefreshPaused(PauseMode.On);
Table_13.getDataSource().setRefreshPaused(PauseMode.On);

 

pauseOff: Resumes the refresh once the user completes their selections.

Table_12.getDataSource().setRefreshPaused(PauseMode.Off);
Chart_10.getDataSource().setRefreshPaused(PauseMode.Off);
Table_13.getDataSource().setRefreshPaused(PauseMode.Off);

3. Handling User Actions

The popup includes three buttons:

  1. Set: Applies the user’s selections and closes the popup.
  2. Cancel: Closes the popup without making any changes.
  3. Reset Selections: Resets the selections in the dropdowns.

Set Button Logic

When the Set button is clicked:

  • Selections are validated to ensure mandatory fields are not empty.
  • If validation fails, error messages are shown, and the popup remains open.
  • On success, filters are applied to the widgets, and data refresh is resumed.

Cancel Button Logic

Close the popup screen.

 

 

Popup_Screen - onButtonClick


//Country and Customer status selections are mandatory, Sales Agent is not.
//If the selection is empty, it stops the page refresh.

//The code block that runs when the Set button was clicked
if(buttonId === "buttonSet") {

	//get selections of dropdowns
	var selectedCountry=Dropdown_Country.getSelectedKey();
	var selectedAgent= Dropdown_SalesAgent.getSelectedKey();
	var selectedStatu= Dropdown_CustStatus.getSelectedKey();
	
	//If Country and Customer Status are not selected
	if(selectedCountry===undefined && selectedStatu===undefined) {
		Popup_Screen.open();
		Application.showMessage(ApplicationMessageType.Error,"Country selection is mandatory.");
		Application.showMessage(ApplicationMessageType.Error,"Customer Status selection is mandatory.");
		VariableObjects.pauseOn();      //Stops the refresh.
	}
	
	//Only if the Country is not selected
	else if(selectedCountry===undefined) {
		Popup_Screen.open();
		Application.showMessage(ApplicationMessageType.Error,"Country selection is mandatory.");
		VariableObjects.pauseOn();      //Stops the refresh.
	}
	
	
	//Only if the Customer Status not selected.
	else if(selectedStatu===undefined) {
		Popup_Screen.open();
		Application.showMessage(ApplicationMessageType.Error,"Customer Status selection is mandatory.");
		VariableObjects.pauseOn();      //Stops the refresh.
	}
	
	//If Country and Customer Status are both selected and Sales Agent selection is up to the user and selected
	else {
			Table_12.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("Country", selectedCountry);
			Chart_10.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("Country", selectedCountry);
			Table_13.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("Country", selectedCountry);
		
			Table_12.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("Customer_Status", selectedStatu);
			Chart_10.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("Customer_Status", selectedStatu);
			Table_13.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("Customer_Status", selectedStatu);
		
			Table_12.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("Sales_Agent",selectedAgent);
			Chart_10.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("Sales_Agent",selectedAgent);
			Table_13.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("Sales_Agent",selectedAgent);

			VariableObjects.pauseOff();
			Popup_Screen.close();
	}
}

//Runs when the Cancel button was clicked
if(buttonId === "buttonCancel")  {
	Popup_Screen.close();
}

 

 

Reset Selections Button Logic

Resets the selections in dropdowns.

 

 

Dropdown_Country.setSelectedKey("undefined");
Dropdown_SalesAgent.setSelectedKey("undefined");
Dropdown_CustStatus.setSelectedKey("undefined");

 

 

Variable Screen Button Logic

With the Variable Screen button on the page, the popup with the Variable screen is made visible.

 

 

//onClick
Popup_Screen.open();

 

 

Real-Time Usage

When implemented, this logic ensures that:

  • Users cannot proceed without selecting mandatory variables.
  • Backend resources are preserved by pausing widget refresh during selection.
  • Data accuracy is maintained by applying relevant filters before any query is executed.

Conclusion

Implementing a variable screen with popups in SAC not only improves data relevance but also boosts overall performance and user satisfaction. This approach is ideal for scenarios where precise filtering is essential before any data is displayed.

I hope this guide helps you design similar solutions for your SAC projects. Stay tuned for more tips, and happy scripting!

Feel free to share your thoughts and questions in the comments below!

SAP Community SAP Analytics Cloud Cloud SAP Analytics Cloud, analytics designer

entry.title: Enhancement J1AMONITOR
entry.content:
Is it possible to make an adjustment or enhancement in the J_A1_WS_MONITOR program in Argentina?
For example, to add a button with new functionality.

entry.title: Re: Is there any method can upload and post API bank stat...
entry.content:
Hi,

 

sorry, but I believe, that you have not done any research. There is of course a bank statement API: https://api.sap.com/api/BANKSTATEMENTPOST_IN/overview

 

I would also propose to check with the Multi-Bank-Connectivity, if there is not already a solution in place, which doesn't need any further development from your side.

 

Best,

Edrilan Berisha

entry.title: Integration Suite Trace Level is not working
entry.content:
After the most recent update, I've noticed there are strange behaviours coming from activating trace in IS, in particular, I can't seem to activate Trace level logs in the following iFlow. It remains as Log Level: Info for any runs that I do:

even if the current configuration should be on Trace: 

 I have tried to redeploy the iFlow, put the log level in debug, error and info then back to Trace.

 

Nothing changes.

 

Is anyone having the same issue? Any input or help would be appreciated!

Tri

entry.title: Re: SAP GUI for Java 8.10 on the Horizon
entry.content:
@AbhishekSharma - do a search specifically for "SAP GUI for Java" and it will come up.

@RMW - Thank you, the File --> System Schema did work as a work around, but the default from sapgui/system_color is not working specifically with the Morning/Evening Horizon themes. I have opened support cases already for both the issues.

entry.title: Re: /SCWM/RACC_IMP_ERP_UI - Time out Dump
entry.content:
Hello Chris, Thanks for responding.

When we tried to pass single object or range of object, then its working.

But when we try without that then its not working.

We have tons of Work orders and WBS elements in our ERP system. Hence we cannot put range to fetch it.

We need to run this report by keeping it blank and fetch all valid cost objects to EWM.

Do we have any solution for this?

Also if new cost object gets introduced in ERP and we want to transfer only this cost object to EWM then how can we do this ? 

I dint find any change pointer program for this.

Thanks,

Onkar

entry.title: Re: Direct link to a SAP Enable Now Glossary
entry.content:
Hi Bart,

OK, I think I understand the issue.  If you are referring to the way that the content plays back, then they are different.  When I playback a glossary accessed under the Glossary button in a library I see something like:

 

 

 

 

 


If I playback the same library using a direct link I see:

 

 

 

 

So, they don't look the same but I'm still able to access the glossary using a direct link.  I'm not sure that there is any way to get the library to look like the version that auto opens up when it is accessed by the library button on a library.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Bottleneck work center to multiple operations
entry.content:
Dear SAP Expert,

I assigned bottleneck work center to multiple operations in a routing. For example, I assigned work center (WC1) to operation 0010 and 0020. Now when I want to schedule capacity using Capacity Scheduling Table app for operation 0020 I cannot as SAP only considers the lowest operation 0010 for capacity scheduling even if the 0020 is a bottleneck. 

How can i schedule operation 0020 in Capacity scheduling table app or both 0010 and 0020 when both are being worked on same bottleneck work center WC1.

entry.title: Focused insights tactical dashboard data validation for Solution manager 7.2 SP18
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

How to validate the focused insights tactical dashboards data for solution manager 7.2 SP18

Below link is applicable to Solution manager 7.1..How to check the same for 7.2

what are the data providers for focused insights tactical dashboards monitoring category wise..how to check them

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/focused-insights-tactical-dashboard-data-validation/ba-p/13301096

SM_WORKCENTER ==> Technical Monitoring ==> Interactive Reporting ==> (select the system ID) ==> System Reports

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Re: // How to retrieve payload based on message id in cpi //
entry.content:
Hi @Rakesh1610 

The answer to your questions is complex.
Important Note: a) SAP Cloud Integration does not log the payload for the messages unless TRACE is explicitly enabled (TRACE will only last 10 min, and the data will be removed after 60 min). b) SAP Cloud Integration has a flexible pipeline: this means you can have one or many source payloads, one or many intermediate payloads, one or many enriched payloads, one or many transformed payloads, and one or many target payloads, all linked to the same message-id.

Yes. You can use APIs or UI to download the payload from a specific message-and-step.

Documentation: https://api.sap.com/api/MessageProcessingLogs/path/get_MessageProcessingLogs___MessageGuid___

Please find an example

Step 1: Use message-id
/api/v1/MessageProcessingLogs('your-message-id-here')

Step 2: Navigate to Runs to get RunId
/api/v1/MessageProcessingLogs('your-message-id')/Runs

Step 3: Navigate to RunSteps
/api/v1/MessageProcessingLogRuns('your-run-id-here')/RunSteps

Step 4: $filter or select a "child" based on your stepId or other criteria
/api/v1/MessageProcessingLogRunSteps(RunId='your-run-id-here',ChildCount=your-child-count)/TraceMessages

Step 5: Navigate to value using TraceId to extract the payload.
/api/v1/TraceMessages(your-TraceId-here)/$value

I hope this helps you. Keep integrating 🖖🏻

Best regards,

Ricardo

entry.title: Re: Error 403 when Create Sales Order using API_SALES_ORD...
entry.content:
Hi @WG23 

The reason it works on your Postman and fails on your system is that Postman automatically forwards the session cookies, but your system is not reusing the session.

You can solve this by forwarding all the cookies.

Note: I recommend using SAP Cloud Integration to integrate your systems. Cloud Integration handles all of these connections to SAP with out-of-the-box functionality.

Best regards 🖖🏻

Ricardo

entry.title: SAP Fiori My Inbox URL generation for intent-based object navigation
entry.content:
Dear expert, 

I'm working on migrating UWL task list to Fiori My Inbox and referring KBA 2274940 - URL generation for intent-based navigation

I'm launching via SAP Work Zone Fiori Inbox Cloud - default webgui / wda

I'm able to configure Open Task via SWFVISU transaction which open the task in a new tab. However, the link in the Related Object tab fails to open the page. 

Configuration has been setup in SWFVISU for Object Visualization. The link generated upon clicked generated as below. The query parameter P_INSTID is generated with encoded value. I tried remove the encoded value manually and the page was able to load correctly. 

https://workzone.host#QMSMObject-process?P_INSTID=%EF%BB%BF0002000021110001%EF%BB%BF&P_CATID=BO&P_TYPEID=QMSM&P_METHOD=DISPLAY

From the web developer tools network response, the parameter is encoded with "Control character zero width no-break space". 

Debug from backend, the field actually returned correct value without any space. 

 

Any idea is there any configuration that I could missed out?

Regards,

Ben

#MyInbox #Fiori #URLGeneration #ObjectVisualization

entry.title: SAC Delete user - user has been setup as an External Connection
entry.content:
Need to delete user in SAC - user has been setup as a HANALIVE Connection user

When transferring content to another user, comes up with error message (refer attached file)

What rights do we need to remove and transfer user, is this full Admin rights/permission?

I am a SAP Security person so have all user admin permissions/rights in SAC systems.

Thanks

entry.title: ECPAYの通知メールを取得できる権限
entry.content:
いつもお世話になっております。

 

ECPAYの通知メールを取得したいのですが、通知メール取得設定欄にECPAYが表示されません。

 

どの権限があったらECPAYの通知メールを取得できるのでしょうか？


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: ECPAYの通知メールを取得できる権限
entry.content:
ご担当者様：

平素よりお世話になっております。

ECPAYの通知メールを取得したいの場合、KBA 2900069 - How S-users manage their own Cloud Notification subscriptions - SAP for Me を参考して、設定いただければ、関連するメールを受け取れます。

お手数をおかけしますが、ご確認するようにお願い申し上げます。

宜しくお願い致します。

以上

SAP サポート

entry.title: Re: 收货的分录中，存货科目的利润中心是判断什么自动带出的？
entry.content:
Hello,

可以尝试 

Custom Business Objects

创建利润中心和物料的对应mapping关系，

然后通过

用增强去读取这个mapping关系，选择利润中心，

FIN_CODING_BLOCK_SUBSTITUTION – Coding Block Substitution

Regards,

Sen

entry.title: Re: FBCJ - Cash journal
entry.content: in this case, make sure your Cash Journal config (FBCJC0) contains the respective GL account is assigned. This is where all the transactions are going to record.

entry.title: Re: Trial Balance Account Group wise or Through G/L Accou...
entry.content:
Hello,

In G/L account dimension in Fiori app :Trial Balance

you can choose GL account hierarchy or FSV defined in Fiori app: Manage Global Hierarchy

Muzammil

entry.title: Re: invisible Import settings for public dimension SAP SAC
entry.content:
Hello,

Perhaps it's because for public dimensions,

such as materials, cost centers, profit centers,

they are master data, and more constant, don't not get changed as much as transaction data imported to model.

and you have variety of ways to import data, including excel upload.

Regards,

Sen

Can you please advise when the prelim information will be available in the RASD tool for customer? 

Thanks

entry.title: Item Cost Not Displaying for a Specific User
entry.content:
One of our users is experiencing an issue where the Item Cost column does not display in the list of items, even though it is already selected in the Form Settings.

We’ve verified that this works fine for other users, so it seems to be isolated to this particular user. We also tried using View > Fit Column Width, but the column still does not appear.

How do we should take to resolve this?

entry.title: Re: It has never been easier to print from SAP with Microsoft Universal Print
entry.content: Hi @Martin-Pankraz - Thanks for the response! I would appreciate a quick sync on this - from my understanding, access method G is not supported in case of SAP Fiori applications integrating with SAP S/4HANA Output Management. Printing using the browser printing features seems to be valid option, only if supported by the respective Fiori app (e.g. if the app provides a PDF Preview). Interested in your opinion on "Frontend" printing if the Fiori app "integrates" with SAP S/4HANA Output Management but does not offer a dedicated PDF preview allowing a browser-based printing. Will drop you a PM. Cheers! Martin

entry.title: Re: No option "Custom application" in Create Extension wi...
entry.content:
Hi,

In the Help Portal, it only lists three functions:

Use the Create Extension extensibility wizard in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition to create:

  • Custom Field: Add a custom field to an existing business object.
  • Custom Logic: Modify standard business processes with custom logic to enhance efficiency and fulfill unique organizational requirements.
  • Custom Process: Automate processes and tasks using SAP Build.

I think maybe in current release, there are only 3 available functions.

Best Regards,

Zhehui

entry.title: Re: How to restrict outbound delivery with respect to ser...
entry.content:
The material which use the serial number, it must be assigned a serial number profile (In material material data: MM03 -> "work scheduling" or "General Plant Data / Storage 1" , the serial number profile will be maintained), pls check the background configuration of "serial number profile".

T-code: OIS2

Path： Plant Maintenance and Customer Service-> Master Data in Plant Maintenance and Customer Service-> Technical Objects-> Equipment -> Serial Number Management->Define Serial Number Profiles

And Check the filed of “Stock” whether is “2”, when you choose "2" for this filed, it will check the stock exist or not.

entry.title: Enhancing Financial Management with SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2408.3
entry.content:
As professionals in the advanced realm of SAP, it is crucial to keep abreast of the developments that can significantly impact your business processes. The latest SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2408.3 (HFC9) release introduces vital enhancements in Finance, focusing specifically on Management Accounting and Margin Analysis.

Advanced Substitution/Validation Hierarchies

This release introduces a notable feature within the [Substitution/Validation Hierarchies]. The feature is designed to provide a more rigorous framework for financial verification through the "Manage Substitution/Validation Rules - Journal Entries" application. This functionality now allows users to meticulously assess Journal Entry Items against defined node hierarchies in Cost Centers and GL Accounts. The feature enhances the integrity of financial processes by ensuring compliance with organizational standards and structures.

With this addition, financial controllers can verify that any cost center or general ledger account used in journal entries aligns with defined hierarchies. This is essential for maintaining the accuracy and reliability of financial postings, thereby upholding the quality and precision of financial management.

Comprehensive Management of Allocations

The updated [“Manage Allocations (New Version) (F3338A)” app] offers a sophisticated solution for managing allocation cycles. This feature builds on the capabilities of its predecessor by providing an improved, clearer interface that enhances user experience while maintaining robust control over financial allocations.

Users are now able to view a full overview of allocation cycles and their associated segments with enhanced visualization. While no modifications can be made in the new version to preserve data integrity, all pertinent details are readily accessible for analysis. Financial managers still have the flexibility to switch to the previous version when adjustments are necessary, ensuring that your financial operations remain adaptable to your unique business needs.

This new version allows you to display cycles and segments, but not change them. To make changes to allocation cycles, continue using Manage Allocations (F3338).

 

Conclusion: 

The SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2408.3 release continues to fortify SAP's commitment to providing cutting-edge solutions for financial management. By incorporating these advanced features into your organizational workflows, businesses can strive towards a future of enhanced efficiency, accuracy, and strategic financial insight. Integrating these enhancements paves the way for more streamlined financial processes, offering unprecedented control and visibility.

For any organization aiming to stay ahead in the competitive business landscape, leveraging these features is essential to achieve superior financial management outcomes.

For any further assistance or queries, feel free to contact your SAP consultant or reach out to the SAP community for additional insights.

entry.title: pcr payroll
entry.content:
Hi experts,

Please help. Im new to PCR and learning the basics. 

I need to write a PCR to read amount from a certain wage type (ex: WT 1000) in input table and multiply it with the number of any other wage type(ex: WT 1001) and store in WT1000. if the amount is greater than 50,000 then add it to output table. 

*

****

1001

ADDWT&NUM

ADDWT*

1000 

ADDWT&AMT

MULTI NAA

ADDWT *

AMT>50000

ADDWT*

i wrote this and it doesnt work.

entry.title: How to configure T042E_WANFF(Number of Days Until Bill of Exchange Pmnt Request Due Date)
entry.content:
Hello everyone, I would appreciate it so much if you would take the time to read and answer my question. 


■Customer requirement
I'm currently customizing the bill of exchange process for Japan in S/4HANA Public Cloud. The customer requirement is to change the due date for BOE payable (see the table below) based on vendors. The span from the posting date can be 1 to 3 months, but it depends on the vendors. (In the case of the table below, the span is 1 month.)
 

MMDDYYYYActionDue Date
12/16/2024Posting an invoice with the payment method O(for BOE)01/31/2025
01/31/2025Running an Automatic Payment Program to post a BOE for the invoice02/28/2025
02/28/2025Clearing the BOE-

 

 


■How I'm trying to deal with it 
For this requirement, I'm currently trying to configure T042E_WANFF in Set Up Payment Methods per Company Code for Payment Transactions(101044) so that I can configure the span for each payment method and then properly assign them to vendors.
■The problem that I have
Is there any way for activating this item? It seems perferct for this requirement, but somehow unavailable to change right now.(Please refer to the image attached.)


Another option would be to maintain terms of payment to have two dates : one is for the invoice, and the other is for the BoE.

Thank you,


Kaito

entry.title: Re: Integration Suite Trace Level is not working
entry.content:
Hi 

I am also facing similar issue in Google chrome, Try to use in Edge it is working.

entry.title: View the execution plan of SAC widgets/ charts
entry.content:
Hello experts,
   I currently using SAC with a Live Connection to my SAP HANA database. When I create a Chart in SAC to view my data, sometimes I get the error "Fail to fetch data" (It has occurred randomly, not all the times) <See the image attached below>.
   The chart is about getting the Top 5 Best Sales Products by Quantity. The data source has about 2 million rows of data, and the Chart also uses the filter to remove the unnecessary products. I wonder whether the errors occurred because my server did not meet the resource requirement to query the data or because it was a SAC issue. So I want to view the execution plan, and query of each Chart/ Widget to run that query under my HANA server. Is there any solution? ( I found that SAC only has the Analyze Story Performance in View Time option to track the time of each Widget, but does not have the execution plan).
I appreciate your help.
Best regards,

Nguyen Thanh Hieu

entry.title: How to connect BPA form with on premise S4 Hana?
Re: Unable to purchase CER006 certification subscription
entry.content: Did anyone have any update regarding India based peoples for exam?

entry.title: Unable to purchase SAP certification exam
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I've prepared for a couple of SAP certifications and wanted to purchase CER006 subscription for 6 SAP certification attempts. Unfortunately, on training.sap.com , I get to page for CER006 but I'm unable to find the book/purchase option. CER006 - SAP Certification Exam, Six Attempts | SAP Training

I've tried multiple browsers, cleared cache etc. Just to test my ID, I tried booking a random course and there I do get option to book but just not for CER006(or CER001)

Has anyone faced similar issues. Ant help on how to go about this would be highly appreciated.

Thanks,

AMRITA

entry.title: Re: Standard fields in acedoca table missing in public cloud
entry.content: Hi Lucy, Thnaks for the update, we have already explored this option. We wanted to cross check if there is any other way we can extend acdoca, as we have to add standard fields.

entry.title: How to multiple email ids of vendor in RltdRmtInf in DMEE File
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,I am an FICO Consultant.I have a query in DMEE.
We are generating DMEE payment files of vendors to the bank.
Banks requested us to give payment information and vendor details(like vendor account no ,name and email id and country).

RltdRmtInf

(RmtLctnMtd(value is EMAL,its constant value),RmtLctnElctrncAdr(email address of vendor),Nm(Name) and Ctry(Country)).

for each vendor there are 3-6 emails ids to vendor.

My requirement is to display 3 email or 6 email ids of vendor in DMEE file.

Here I used RltdRmtInf its coming for 1 time ie first email id of vendor is displaying. ABAPer has put the logic to get emailids from ADR6 and LFA1 table based on vendor account but its not coming
for multiple emails ids.

Do i need to write the logic in conditions tab or anything, please let me know?

Thanks,
Geetha R.

entry.title: ABAP CDS VIEW TO FETCH SUM OF QTY FROM MSEG TABLE FOR ALL ITEMS WITH RESPECT TO GIVEN INPUT
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I have a requirement to fetch the summation of Quantity from mseg table, menge is the field for quantity , shkzg is the field considered for Credit / Debit i.e., if it is "H" then we consider that item as Credit and if it is "S" then it is Debit. Please find the below 

 

define view ZTEST_MSEG_VIEWNAME as select from mseg 
 
{
key matnr as Matnr,
werks as Werks,
lgort   as Lgort,
menge as Quantity,
shkzg as CreditDebitInd,
count(*)   as totalCount,
case 
when shkzg = 'H' then (menge * 1)
when shkzg = 'S' then (menge * -1)
end as creditDebitQuantity
} 
where matnr = 'XXXXXXXXI.' and werks = 'XX4' and lgort = 'XXEN'  
group by matnr,werks,lgort,menge,shkzg

We created one more cds view to take the summation of the creditDebitQuantity as show below 

define view ZINV_MSEG_SUM_VIEWNAME as select from ZTEST_MSEG_VIEWNAME 

{ 
key  Matnr as Matnr,
key  Werks as Plant,
key  Lgort as Location,
 CreditDebitInd as CreditDebit,
sum(creditDebitQuantity ) as TOTAL_QTY
 
} 
where Matnr = 'XXXXXXXX.' and Werks = 'XX4' and Lgort = 'XXEN'

group by Matnr,Werks,Lgort,CreditDebitInd

on Executing the above we are getting summation of quantity as show below 

which shows that total Credit Quantity is 349 and Total Debit Quantity is 71 but this is not in sync with the summation count displayed at the MSEG Table in S/4 HANA SYSTEM. please find the below 

The sum of menge for items having value as "H" in column shkzg is 1065 and the sum of menge for items having value as "S" in column shkzg is 1075.  for given material, plant and lgort. 

please do the need full, as the ABAP CDS View should also display the same output as 1065 & 1075 , but instead it is displaying 71 & 349 respectively  

Thank you

Hi,

Please check following threads for some example queries and you can further build on it based on your reporting requirements:

Jitin

entry.title: Re: Item Cost Not Displaying for a Specific User
entry.content:
Hi,

Check if SAP note 1224747 is relevant for your case.

If yes, you need to contact SAP Support via the support launchpad to get the issue investigated.

Kr,

Jitin

entry.title: Re: How to group the multiple rental units into different...
entry.content:
Hi Sridhar,

If you need to separate out different Rental Objects you would normally use the Rental Object Type for that. The benefit is that this will allow you to control which rental object types can be used for which contract types. The disadvantage is that this attribute is static and cannot be changed afterwards in case the RO is reconfigured from Senior to Junior in your case. 

If you are referring to grouping for RO's on the contract itself (e.g. 1 contract with 3 Junior RO's and 4 Senior RO's) you can use the "Object Group" to setup a "senior" and "junior" group. You'll have to update the config for "allowed assignment objects per object type" and specify object type IL for the respective contract types.

Regards, Andre

entry.title: Re: Approval check availability for App "Manage Budget Document - Project" in S4 Hana Publ
entry.content: Hi Sai, Do we have any alternate solution to achieve this workflow? I do not see API the way i see for the Project budget workflow process.

entry.title: Re: pcr payroll
entry.content:
You have to write Two PCRS and they should be as per below 

1001

ADDWT*

ADDWT&NUM

1000 

NUM=&  NUM

MULTI NAA

ADDWT *

Write the above two PCRs and revert with your results here we will go to the next one once you achieve the above one

Here Number from WT 1000 will be multiplied with Amount in WT 1001  , Ensure you have inserted the PCR with PIT and check the output of each PCR.

DM me in case of any issue

entry.title: New inspection type 09
entry.content:
Hello! Please tell me, has anyone created their own type of verification with the origin 09? I have created a new inspection type, origin 09, but I do not have inspection lot QA05 created. My inspection type

When I go through the steps in PERFORM preload_qmat_add_fields.

At this point, it is deleted

Takes the first one by default

entry.title: Not able to activate Trading partner Agreement with MIG using custom message
entry.content:
Hello Folks,

I created a MIG with a custom X12 structure. When I tried to use this in trading partner agreement and activate it , I am getting the below error.

Error was : Failed to publish Message Implementation Guideline with id 4b6dd29d12024347b1d9b875c1c2b345 to Partner Directory. Error was : Error executing [PUSH_TO_PD] on service [SAP Integration Advisor]. Response was [Code: 500, Reason : Internal Server Error : {"errorCode":"FAILED_TO_PUSH_ARTIFACT_TO_CPI","errorMessage":"Cannot invoke \"com.sap.it.spc.smarti.ica.exporter.util.ArtifactHolder.getContent()\" because \"msgXsd\" is null"}]

Can anyone please help ?

For India available via partner and you had to contact SAP.  

No solution yet or further info , I am in very much same boat as you are in.

Thanks

Rishav

entry.title: Re: reverse IW8W for refurbishment GR
entry.content:
Greetings,

take a look at SAP note 507662. Perhaps it will solve your problem.

Best regards, M.

entry.title: Re: custom filter not working
entry.content:
Hello Mike,

The filter you have added is it a page filter?
Can you make sure that the filter is applied to/connected to the required widgets you want the filter to work on.

Please see Work with the Linked Widgets Diagram (Optimized) | SAP Help Portal
This will help in seeing if the filter is connected to the required widgets

BR
Sumit

entry.title: Re: AGGREGATION ON CDS VIEW and Filtering data with where clause issue
entry.content:
I think you need to use "join with internal tab" (as you pointed INNER ITAB_CDS) if the system version allowed (directly with MARD, not via CDS). It should resolve the restriction with FAE (full code is here).

And it seems ( maybe I am wrong ) that we could not resolve only by cds. we should either: do extra calculation on application server  or do join itab (as new feature).

 

        TYPES: BEGIN OF ts_matnr_werks
            , matnr TYPE matnr18
            , werks TYPE werks_d
          , END OF ts_matnr_werks
          , tt_matnr_werks_srt TYPE sorted TABLE OF ts_matnr_werks WITH UNIQUE key matnr werks
          .

     data lt_tab_matnr_srt TYPE tt_matnr_werks_srt.
     FIELD-SYMBOLS <fs_tab_matnr> TYPE ts_matnr_werks.

    " just to prepare sorted table
    loop at mt_tab_matnr ASSIGNING <fs_tab_matnr>.
      INSERT <fs_tab_matnr> INTO TABLE lt_tab_matnr_srt.
    ENDLOOP.

    select z1~matnr, sum( labst ) as stock
        FROM zmard as z1
          join @LT_tab_matnr_srt as z2
        on z1~matnr eq z2~matnr
        and z1~werks eq z2~werks
      WHERE z1~lgort in @s_lgort
      GROUP BY z1~matnr
      INTO TABLE @DATA(lt_stock)
      .

entry.title: Re: Checking Control
entry.content:
Greetings,

it all comes down to the question if you want to perform material availability during production order release. If you want to perform this check you must select the indicator. Otherwise, leave it unselected.

Best regards, M.

entry.title: Re: FORM TEMPLATE FOR OUTGOING CHECK IN SAP S/4HANA, PUBL...
entry.content: Hi customer, Good Day! Now there is no specific template for outgoing check for the Philippines. So we suggest you use the standard one. If you want to have a specific template, your cooperation to submit a new feature request will be highly appreciated. 2807810 - What is Support issue – What is Feature Request: Cloud Solutions 2963059 - How to Submit Feature Requests for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Product

entry.title: Supplier Quotation for Partail items in RFQ
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

I have the same question as the one in the following post, but the answer provided there does not fully address my concern:

Creating Supplier Quotation for Partial Items in RFQ

It is common that some vendors only provide quotations for a subset of the items listed in an RFQ. How can I create a supplier quotation for only the items that the vendor has quoted?

Thank you!

Haily Huang

entry.title: DATA POINT COMMENT ENABLE In ANALYTICAL MODEL
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I was learning in eLearning and found the document is not up to date.

 

For example data point comment, it is mentioned it is only available only for Planning and BPC live model.

But i found it is working with Analytical model as well.

another noticed is regarding Blending 

 

it is stated blending not there in optimize mode available only in classic design stories  whereas in Optimize story design for Chart i can see data blending option is enable but for table it is disable.

 

can you please correct me if i am wrong.

 

Thanks

Suraj

IBM

But it doesn't work in case of freight unit. Can you please help me with this if there is any other specific class for freight units. Please let me know if more info is required. Thank you in advance.  

 

you need to pass FU key, it will take care of creating text at FU level..

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to search a dynamic attribute as a cri...
entry.content: Yes, Solr support for Backoffice is available. You can find more details in the documentation for Solr Search in Backoffice. To enable it, you may need to make some configuration and widget changes in Backoffice, as well as updates to the Solr configuration (the one with description "SolrSearchConfig for backoffice").

We have done the payment for 1 pc also now we need to clear the GR/IR account but not possible because still 4 quantity we have to do invoice but we did not receive the invoice and not possible to reverse the GR in this case how to do gr/ir clearing. entry.title: Re: Multiple receiver routing in SAP PI/PO
entry.content:
Hi Dileep,

You can select multiple channels based on your operational mapping and whichever Business component you have used for the same need to create required channel and select on outbound processing tab.

entry.title: Re: SAP PI REST-Sender Adapter Custom Error Handling Expr...
entry.content:
I think the JSON element in your JSON expression is wrong, it should be errorReply.status without $

see an example in this blog post

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/pi-rest-adapter-custom-error-handling/ba-p/13280280

Alex

entry.title: Re: Get the data from RFC BAPI Result
entry.content:
Have you heard of „Read Access Logging“ (RAL)?

RAL is able to log data which has left the system at one of its external interfaces (RAL speaks of channels).

This might be of interest for you.

 

Regards and Merry Xmas, Wolfgang

these might help: 3427972 - Change Type values for Delta Changes in SAP Datasphere & Replication Flow Scenarios with Different Load Types | SAP Help Portal

Best regards

entry.title: Re: BW reporting preview freezes in Eclipse
entry.content:
Hi Roland,

sorry for the delay, had a few days off, thx for your answer;

it works in RSRT and it works if I use the "copy URL" button in the Eclipse preview window and paste it in Chrome, only the Eclipse preview window freezes.
By the way - if I had known before I had used the "copy URL" earlier  😄    data load in Chrome seems to me much faster than in Eclipse...

cheers
Mathias

entry.title: theoretical question: a tiny portion of hdb00003/datavolume_0000.dat is lost
entry.content:
Consider this as a theoretical question.  

Customer's HANA database is down. Their indexserver data volume hdb00003/datavolume_0000.dat  is 50GB in size. 

Log file shows there is input/output error when loading indexserver data volume. 

A disk problem is found, there is a bad sector.  Customer recovered the file with ddrescue. dd rescue shows that 16kb is lost.  

There is no backup of any kind. don't even think about it.  

Server has been rebooted. HANA won't start up anymore. 

Is there hope for recovering some data at all? They don't care about data consistency anymore at this point. I would compare this scenario to pulling a brick off of a skyscraper. In my naive opinion, it's a bit ridiculous to say it's impossible to salvage any data at all.

entry.title: Re: error handling on process automation BPA with NO RPA
entry.content: you can't handle a condition when error.

REQUEST: I am requesting you manually redeem my code on behalf of my account

PROGRAM NAME is Digital Skills Initiative digitalskills@sap.com

TROUBLESHOOTING: I did tried to switch browser from chrome to Internet explorer edge, Cleared cache and again sign in, tried also on mobile. nothing working.

we created the default Route, system is picking default route in FU level.
